title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client (PyPI: ollama) for chatting, embedding, pulling models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client (npm: ollama) that works in Node & browsers via the Ollama REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (pip: langchain-ollama) supplying LLM, chat, embeddings and tool-calling wrappers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) with multi-user support, model manager, code highlighting.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client library (Maven Central) for Ollama’s REST API with Kotlin extensions.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced Go CLI that wraps ollama with prompt templates, conversation history and shell completion.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma to chat with private documents.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-nvidia
summary: Community Docker images with CUDA & cuDNN pre-installed for GPU-accelerated Ollama on NVIDIA hardware.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU nodes and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder components for NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C# .NET client (NuGet: OllamaSharp) supporting chat, completions, embeddings and model management.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that bridges Ollama models to Slack channels using Bolt framework.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate (cargo: ollama-rs) providing strongly-typed wrappers for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a reproducible CI service for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rag-qa
summary: Streamlit app showcasing retrieval-augmented generation with Ollama embeddings and Weaviate vector DB.

title: ollama-zsh
summary: Zsh plugin that adds autocompletion and handy aliases for common ollama CLI operations.

title: ollama-rust-sdk
summary: Rust crate published on crates.io offering async/await bindings to Ollama’s chat, embed and model APIs.
